title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Franky, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Luffy, Unknown person #12 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Run straight out of the dome!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't allow that massive dude to go on a rampage any more than this

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you treat my general frankly as a toy!? I'll make sure you regret even thinking that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Would be Con- Venient for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You seem sincere, but you're still hiding something

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Snap out of your stupor and get over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yo! Yo! X Drake!! I heard that you bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you've decided to leech of that weak pirate crew this time?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've hated this guy from the very beginning. I'll gonna crush him, but I'm not doing it for you guys

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Looks like we're a team now

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You thought you could run away!? You traitor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You're being attacked by a weirdo again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think you can kill me with something like this....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Huh? It can't be! These bullets are....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's as far as you all will go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jack was hand-picked by me, he's one of my "ALL STARS"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I can't just sit here and watch

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: As you murder of my precious subordinates

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 38 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
